hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '').strip()
for m in re.finditer(r'(?<![a-zA-Z0-9_])(grep|rg)(\\s|$)', cmd):
    pos = m.start()
    before = cmd[:pos].rstrip()
    if not before.endswith('|'):
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'deny', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'Bash grep/rg is denied in this repo. For code reads use scripts/read-code.sh (read_code_context/read_code_window/read_code_symbols); for markdown reads use scripts/read-markdown.sh.'}}))
        break
"
hooks.statusMessage: Blocking bash grep/rg; route reads through read-code/read-markdown helpers...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.py) uv run pyright "$f" 2>&1 | tail -10 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.py) python3 scripts/validate_python_docstrings.py "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
